title: Admin Login and Role-based Redirect
description: Verify admin can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the admin dashboard with KPI stats.

steps.description: Navigate to /login/admin page
Input valid admin username and password
Click login button
Verify successful login and redirect to admin dashboard
Verify KPI stats and admin management menus are visible

title: Admin Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Ensure admin login fails and shows the appropriate error message when invalid credentials are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login/admin page
Input invalid username or password
Click login button
Verify login is rejected and error message is displayed

title: Role-based Access Control Enforcement
description: Verify users cannot access pages or APIs outside their designated roles and unauthorized requests are denied.

steps.description: Log in as a student
Attempt to access admin dashboard URL
Access is denied or redirected to an error page
Send API requests requiring teacher or admin role with student token
API responds with 403 Forbidden or appropriate error

title: Admin Dashboard CRUD Operations for Students
description: Verify admin can create, read, update and delete student user records successfully via the dashboard.

steps.description: Log in as admin and open student management page
Create a new student with valid details and save
New student appears in the list with correct details
Update student information and save changes
Changes are reflected in the student record
Delete a student record
Student is removed from the list

title: Lesson Scheduling and Google Meet Link Generation
description: Verify admin and teachers can schedule lessons and system correctly generates Google Meet links.

steps.description: Log in as teacher or admin and navigate to lesson scheduling page
Fill in lesson details including date, time, and participants
Save the lesson
Verify lesson is listed in schedule
Google Meet link is generated and attached to the lesson data

title: Teacher Starts Live Lesson and Meet Link Activation
description: Verify teacher can start a live lesson which activates the Google Meet link and updates lesson status.

steps.description: Log in as teacher and open upcoming lesson details
Click 'Start Live Lesson' button
Lesson status updates to 'live'
Google Meet link becomes active and joinable
System prevents starting lesson outside scheduled time

title: Student Joins Live Lesson Successfully
description: Verify student can view upcoming lessons via carousel and join live Google Meet sessions.

steps.description: Log in as student and navigate to home page
Upcoming lessons are displayed in carousel
Select a live lesson and click on the join link
Google Meet session launches successfully
Attempt to join a lesson outside live status
Access is denied and user is informed the lesson is not live

title: Student Assignment Submission and Grade Viewing
description: Verify students can submit assignments and view grades assigned by teachers.

steps.description: Log in as student and browse to assignments page
Submit valid assignment files or text
Submission confirmation is shown
Reload assignment page or check grades section
Grades and teacher feedback are visible when available

title: Teacher Uploads Materials and Creates Educational Reels
description: Verify teacher can upload lesson materials, create, edit, and publish AI-generated educational reels.

steps.description: Log in as teacher and access materials page
Upload supported file types for lesson materials
Uploaded materials appear in the list and are accessible
Use AI-driven reel generation feature to create a new reel
Edit reel metadata and preview content
Publish the reel
Reel status updates and reel is available for students to view

title: Parent Dashboard Displays Accurate Child Progress Details
description: Verify parent can log in and view correct attendance, grades, and course progress of their children.

steps.description: Log in as parent and navigate to parent dashboard
Children's names and enrolled courses are listed
Attendance records for each child are accurately displayed
Grades and progress summary are shown with no data inconsistencies
Upcoming lessons for children are visible

title: VR Eduverse Loads and Supports Interaction
description: Verify VR educational experiences load properly, present interactive science simulations and virtual field trips.

steps.description: Navigate to VR Eduverse main page
VR canvas and controls initialize without errors
Select science simulation module (e.g. Solar System)
Interactive elements respond to user control
Navigate to virtual field trip (e.g. Pyramids of Giza)
3D environment loads and hotspot info panels display correctly

title: Student Exam Simulation and Readiness Scoring
description: Verify student can take exam simulations, submit answers and obtain scoring and readiness feedback accurately.

steps.description: Log in as student and navigate to exam simulation page
Select an exam simulation and start test
Answer all questions and submit exam
System calculates and displays total score
Readiness feedback is provided based on results
Attempt to submit incomplete or malformed answers
Validation errors are handled and informative messages shown

title: Internationalization Language Toggle with RTL Support
description: Verify that toggling language switches UI text between Arabic and English correctly and RTL layouts adjust accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to any main application page
Switch language setting from English to Arabic
All UI text changes to Arabic
Page layout adjusts to RTL orientation
Switch back to English language
UI text switches back and layout returns to LTR

title: Notification System Delivers Alerts via All Channels
description: Verify that notifications are sent correctly via email, SMS, push, and in-app channels with respect to user timezone.

steps.description: Trigger notification event for a user
Email notification is received
SMS notification is received
Push notification is delivered if applicable
In-app notification appears in user dashboard
Check timestamps respect the user's configured timezone

title: API Endpoint Role-based Permission Validation
description: Verify API routes enforce user roles correctly and handle invalid or malformed requests gracefully with proper HTTP responses.

steps.description: Send API request to a protected course management endpoint with valid admin token
Request is successful with expected data returned
Send same request with unauthorized role token (e.g. student)
Response returns 403 Forbidden or access denied
Send malformed requests missing required parameters
API responds with 400 Bad Request and error details

title: UI Component Responsiveness and Accessibility
description: Verify that key UI components render correctly across different device screen sizes and comply with accessibility standards.

steps.description: Load various pages on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
UI components resize and reposition gracefully without layout breakage
All interactive components are navigable via keyboard
Appropriate aria attributes and labels are present for screen readers

title: Simultaneous Lesson Join Handling and Expired Session Errors
description: Ensure the system handles concurrency for multiple students joining live lessons and gracefully manages expired or invalid sessions.

steps.description: Multiple simulated student users join the same live lesson simultaneously
All users are successfully admitted without race conditions
Attempt to join a lesson with an expired Google Meet session link
User receives informative error and cannot join the session
Attempt access with invalid lesson identifiers in URL
System redirects or shows error without crashing
